name: Organic Chocolate Cake Slice
description: A rich and decadent chocolate cake made with organic ingredients.
fullDescription: Indulge in our signature Organic Chocolate Cake — a masterpiece of rich, velvety layers crafted from 70% dark cacao sourced from sustainable farms. Each slice is moist, dense, and finished with a silky ganache glaze. Free from artificial preservatives, this cake is as wholesome as it is indulgent. Perfect for celebrations or a quiet moment of self-care.

name: Almond Milk with Chia & Blueberries
description: A creamy almond milk infused with chia seeds and blueberries.
fullDescription: Start your morning right with our cold-pressed Almond Milk blend, enriched with omega-rich chia seeds and antioxidant-packed wild blueberries. Lightly sweetened with organic agave, this drink is dairy-free, vegan, and packed with nutrients. Shake well and enjoy chilled for the ultimate refreshing boost.

name: Fresh Organic Strawberries
description: Juicy and sweet organic strawberries, perfect for snacking or desserts.
fullDescription: Hand-picked at peak ripeness from certified organic farms, our strawberries burst with natural sweetness and vibrant flavor. No pesticides, no additives — just pure, sun-kissed fruit. Great for smoothies, desserts, salads, or simply enjoyed fresh. Delivered same-day to preserve maximum freshness.

name: Buttery Croissants with Almonds
description: Flaky and buttery croissants filled with almond paste and topped with sliced almonds.
fullDescription: Baked fresh every morning, our Almond Croissants are a true French-inspired delight. Layers of hand-folded, butter-laminated dough encase a generous filling of house-made frangipane — sweet almond cream with a nutty depth. Finished with toasted almond slices and a dusting of powdered sugar. Best enjoyed warm with a cup of coffee.
